verdict_detail: Pass40 keeps the scaffold apples-to-apples and preserves the repaired control verdict, but it does not beat pass37 on brux1 (pass37 stays at 0.118 while pass40 reaches 0.112).

follow_through_context.why_pass39_mattered: pass39 showed mean was the right stronger offender to test first, but envelope_cv + mean still did not beat pass37 on brux1
follow_through_context.current_follow_through_scope: final equally bounded earlier-stage record-relative floor follow-through with pass35 shape merge and evaluation contract fixed

safest_next_step: Stop this same-family floor subloop and preserve pass37 as the safest bounded stabilization surface inside the current scaffold; the next benchmark increment should move to one new bounded representation question outside this exact envelope_cv floor family rather than another companion swap.

explicitly_rejected_broader_move.move: channel pivot, broad feature expansion, privacy implementation, or synthetic-data/LLM work
explicitly_rejected_broader_move.why: pass40 closes the exact same-family floor follow-through and still leaves brux1 below threshold, so broadening now would blur a localized negative result rather than resolve the benchmark.
